tasks.title: Hybrid Skill+Subagent 아키텍처 구현 — 12 Skills (5 knowledge + 7 script)
tasks.notes: Phase 1~5 완료. .claude/skills/ 12개 Skills + 9개 agent trailing blocks + CLAUDE.md Skills section. Cron parity preserved — harness/scripts/workflows 미수정.

tasks.title: [Golden Test] Main Claude: 'SAP 101 정의?' → sap-movement-accounts autoload
tasks.notes: Expected: sap-movement-accounts Skill autoloads, no Subagent call. Dr. 재고자산 / Cr. 매입채무 + 더존 1xxx/2xxx codes returned.

tasks.title: [Golden Test] Main Claude: '오늘 입하 GR 처리해줘' → SK-02 wms-inbound routes
tasks.notes: Expected: SK-02 wms-inbound Subagent invoked (입하/GR keywords). Skill referenced inside agent, not bypassed.

tasks.title: [Golden Test] Main Claude: 'tms settlement 돌려줘' → explicit confirm required
tasks.notes: Expected: tms-settlement-daily disable-model-invocation=true prevents autoload. User must explicitly invoke. Dry-run-first protocol shown.

tasks.title: [Golden Test] GitHub Actions tms_settlement.yml cron — identical output to pre-Phase-1
tasks.notes: Expected: git diff harness/ scripts/ pdf/ api/ .github/workflows/ shows zero modifications. Cron runs unchanged.

tasks.title: [Golden Test] SK-06 internal: 'OTIF 공식' → loads scm-kpi-formulas from agent context
tasks.notes: Expected: scm-kpi-formulas Skill provides OTIF = On-Time × In-Full formula. No duplication in agent body needed.

tasks.title: Harness Verifier 설계법 적용 — verifier.py (formative + summative)
tasks.notes: jkf87.github.io/harness-verifier-rubric 보고서 기반. 5차원 루브릭: 범위/무결성/커버리지/이상치/비즈니스룰. harness/settlement/verifier.py 신규 작성 + backfill_total_cbm_safe.py 통합. formative(건별) / summative(전체 완료 후 게이트) 분리.

tasks.title: Total_CBM 백필 완료 확인 + 결과 검증
tasks.notes: backfill_total_cbm_safe.py 백그라운드 실행 중 (task bdg1yt00n). 완료 후 filled/skipped/errors 집계 확인 필요. 박종성 104건 수동 상하차비용 정리도 병행.

tasks.title: Phase C — W3 WMS Box-Mix Forecast 위젯
tasks.notes: sync_wms_box_mix.py (매일 17:00 KST) + WMS탭 내일 필요 박스명칭별 예상 수량 스택바. wms_box_mix_forecast 테이블 (schema.sql에 미포함, 별도 migration 필요).

tasks.title: Phase D — K1 차량이용률 v2 (CBM-weighted) AutoResearch 업데이트
tasks.notes: tms_weekly_runner.py에 util_v2 = Σ(Total_CBM) / Σ(vehicle.capacity_m3) 추가. tms_carrier_capacity 마스터 활용. 주간 리포트에 count기반/CBM기반 이용률 병렬 표시.

tasks.title: sincerely-scm-dashboard v1 — Agentic OS dashboard (React + Supabase + Vercel)
tasks.notes: Phase 2 CBM 위젯 완료 (W1/W2/W4/W3). Phase C(W3 WMS Box-Mix) + Phase D(K1 util_v2) 모두 완료. 17:00 KST 전용 cron 추가.
